name: cortex-ingest-p4
title: cortex P4 ingest pipeline 增强 (PDF/EPUB/DOCX + bulk)
description:
扩展 cortex MCP server, 加 ingest_url + ingest_file 两 tool:
1. mcp/tools/ingest_url.py — defuddle/readability 双路抽正文, url_security 前置, html_sanitize + masking 后置
2. mcp/tools/ingest_file.py — PDF (pypdf) / EPUB (ebooklib) / DOCX (python-docx) 抽取
3. mcp/lib/extractors/ — pdf.py / epub.py / docx.py / html.py (readability fallback)
4. urls.txt 批量 ingest 入口
5. 新 skill cortex-ingest-bulk (兼 hooks 触发)
6. cortex-ingest SKILL.md 更新: 首选 mcp__cortex__ingest_url / ingest_file
依赖: pipx 安装时增加 pypdf/ebooklib/python-docx (pyproject.toml 添加)
不动 P0 安全模块 + P1 server/search/save 现状, 仅扩展。
creator: nico
